_comment: Copy this file into your survey data directory and adjust thresholds as needed.
_ndsi_threshold_note: Min NDSI to accept a pixel. 0.87=clean snow, 0.4=dirty/glacial ice.
_shadow_ratio_threshold_note: Max ratio of first band to 560nm band. Increase to include more shadow pixels.
_solar_zenith_max_note: Max effective solar zenith angle (degrees). Reduce to exclude very oblique illumination.
_chunk_rows_note: Rows per processing chunk. Increase for more RAM (faster), decrease for less RAM.
